question: A company in Ontario hires four individuals under new employment agreements dated as follows: an intern on September 1, 2020; a chief financial officer on January 15, 2022; a former owner who sold their business and joined as an employee on February 1, 2022; and a retail clerk on October 24, 2021. Given that Ontario’s ban on non-compete clauses took effect October 25, 2021 and is non-retroactive, how many of these employees may have enforceable non-compete clauses? Provide your answer as a numerical digit.
